who_we_are.title: Who We Are
who_we_are.description: A.FREE.DEAL is a digital platform dedicated to buying and selling products across Cameroon.
who_we_are.goal: Our goal is to provide a secure, friendly, and trustworthy space where everyone can buy and sell a wide range of products, from any city in the country.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: Develop an intuitive platform that enables our members to offer, search for, and buy products with complete confidence, everywhere in Cameroon.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: Become the leading e-commerce platform in Cameroon and foster an inclusive and supportive digital economy among Cameroonians.

values.title: Our Values
values.principles_intro: Our actions and decisions are guided by clear principles:
values.quality: Trust: Build a safe and transparent environment.
values.trust: Excellence: Ensure optimal satisfaction for our users.
values.excellence: Social responsibility: Support Cameroonian merchants and entrepreneurs.
values.social_responsibility: Solidarity: Foster a local, inclusive and community-driven economy.

differentiators.title: What Sets Us Apart
differentiators.community_focus: Local focus: A dedicated platform highlighting the best sellers and products in Cameroon.
differentiators.enhanced_security: Enhanced security: Verification, reviews, and mediation for trustworthy interactions.
differentiators.user_friendliness: User-friendliness: An intuitive, simple, and pleasant interface.
differentiators.positive_impact: Positive impact: Every transaction supports local entrepreneurs and boosts their visibility.

commitment.title: Our Commitment to Users
commitment.for_providers: For sellers: Increased visibility, new customers, and practical tools to grow their business.
commitment.for_clients: For buyers: Easy access to reliable, high-quality products tailored to their needs.

About_us.about_us_why_choose_text: At A.FREE.DEAL, we believe in the potential and strength of Cameroonian entrepreneurs. Our mission is to empower local products, build trust, and create equitable opportunities for all. Whether you're a buyer or a seller, the platform supports you in bringing your projects to fruition and building a prosperous future.
About_us.about_us_start_text1: Your project is in good hands with AFreeDeal.
About_us.about_us_start_text2: Join us and let’s grow together!

Join_the_team.mission_title: Joining the team is more than just a job
Join_the_team.mission_content: We are a team of passionate individuals, convinced of the strength of the collective and the wealth of African talent. Every day, we move forward together to shine a spotlight on skills that are too often left in the shadows. Authenticity, creativity, and excellence are at the heart of everything we do. Why not join the adventure? If you're looking for a meaningful project, where your energy really makes a difference... then welcome, you've come to the right place.
Join_the_team.we_find_the_offer: we find the offer that suits you best
Join_the_team.intro_paragraph_1: We are a team of passionate individuals, convinced of the strength of the collective and the wealth of African talent. Every day, we move forward together to shine a spotlight on skills that are too often left in the shadows. Authenticity, creativity, and excellence are at the heart of everything we do.
Join_the_team.intro_paragraph_2: Why not join the adventure? If you are looking for a meaningful project, where your energy really makes a difference... then welcome, you have come to the right place.

1.title: 1. Purpose
paragraphe: AFREEDEAL, as a hosting site, provides a mobile platform (www.afreedeal.com) allowing sellers to present and sell their products through a public catalog accessible to buyers, everywhere in Cameroon.
AFREEDEAL is not a contracting party to contracts concluded between members. The platform does not intervene in the negotiation, conclusion, execution, or payment of transactions.

By creating an account on the AFREEDEAL platform, the member agrees to all of these terms of use. AFREEDEAL reserves the right to modify these terms. In such a case, members will be notified by email within 10 business days before the new terms take effect. Each member is free to accept the modified terms or to stop using the site. The modified terms take effect automatically and replace the previous ones. In case of refusal, the member can delete their account via the site settings.

2.title: 2. Definitions
list_items: Member: Any person using the site, either as a seller or buyer.
Seller: Member who offers for sale one or more products on the platform.
Buyer / Client: Member who buys one or more products on the platform.
Username: Public identifier chosen by a member acting as a buyer.
Store name: Public identifier specifically chosen by a seller for their store.
Product: Article or goods offered for sale by a seller.
External communication channels: Means of communication voluntarily provided by members, such as phone, WhatsApp, or email.
Cookie: File used to store browsing data.

ordered_list.title: 3.1. Account creation
content: Account creation is effective upon validation of the registration form.
Registration on the platform is free.

ordered_list.title: 3.2. Public information
content: By joining AFREEDEAL, members agree that certain information may be made public: first name, last name, country, username or store name (optional), and profile picture (if added).
For greater transparency, sellers must display a profile picture.

ordered_list.title: 3.3. Account modification
content: Members can modify their personal information at any time. Information in the 'Seller Profile' section may be subject to validation by the support team.

ordered_list.title: 3.4. Account deletion
content: Members can temporarily deactivate or permanently delete their account via the settings. This action is immediate.
In case of non-compliance with these Terms, AFREEDEAL reserves the right to suspend or delete an account.

4.title: 4. Listings
paragraphe: Members can add listings to the platform and receive orders. Any creation or modification of a listing is subject to validation by the support team.

ordered_list.title: 4.1. Creating a listing
content: Publishing listings is free and unlimited. However, the platform reserves the right to accept or reject a listing.
The seller freely sets the price on their listings. However, the platform may reject a listing if the price seems inconsistent with the product offered.

ordered_list.title: 4.2. Acceptance or refusal of a listing
content: The platform reviews each listing before it is published. It may request modifications (e.g., spelling corrections, adding photos). To maintain quality, it may reject a listing without justification.

ordered_list.title: 4.3. Modifying a listing
content: The seller can modify a listing at any time. Any modification by the seller is subject to new validation by the support team.

ordered_list.title: 4.4. Deleting a listing
content: A listing can be hidden at any time by the seller. It then becomes invisible to buyers, but ongoing transactions remain active.
In case of permanent deletion or deactivation, all information related to this listing will be deleted and cannot be recovered.
The platform may also unpublish a listing following complaints and will contact the seller to find a solution.

ordered_list.title: 4.5. Product sales
content: AFREEDEAL is a marketplace allowing members to sell their products without fees. During the launch phase, no commission will be charged. After this phase, an official communication will specify the commission amount in an updated version of the Terms of Use.

5.title: 5. Communication between members
paragraphe: Members do not have internal messaging on the AFREEDEAL platform. Exchanges between buyers and sellers are conducted exclusively through external channels, such as phone numbers, WhatsApp, or email addresses voluntarily provided by members.

AFREEDEAL does not intervene in the content of exchanges, negotiations, or the execution of transactions concluded between members. Members are solely responsible for the information they share and the exchanges made through these external channels.

6.title: 6. AFREEDEAL's liability
paragraphe: AFREEDEAL makes every effort to ensure secure and continuous access to the platform, without obligation of result.

Contracts, agreements, payments, and deliveries are concluded directly between members, outside the platform, through external communication channels. AFREEDEAL does not intervene at any point in these transactions and cannot be held responsible for disputes, payments, delivery failures, or non-execution of orders.
AFREEDEAL disclaims any responsibility regarding the accuracy of information and products published by members.

7.title: 7. Seller's tax obligations
paragraphe: The seller is solely responsible for their tax obligations, including the declaration and payment of any applicable tax, duty, or VAT, in accordance with current Cameroonian legislation. AFREEDEAL cannot be held responsible in this regard.

8.title: 8. Intellectual property
paragraphe: The seller guarantees to hold all necessary rights to sell their products and to publish their photos and content. They authorize AFREEDEAL to use the associated content for promotional purposes without further permission.

9.title: 9. Data and privacy
paragraphe: Members' personal data are processed in accordance with applicable law in Cameroon. No data will be shared with third parties without explicit consent, except as required by law.

10.title: 10. Limitation of financial liability
paragraphe: To the fullest extent permitted by applicable law, AFREEDEAL's total liability to a member, for any cause whatsoever, is limited to the amount potentially paid by that member to AFREEDEAL during the twelve (12) months preceding the occurrence of the damage.
AFREEDEAL shall in no event be liable for indirect damages, loss of data, loss of profit, loss of customers, or commercial prejudice.

11.title: 11. Indemnification
paragraphe: The member agrees to indemnify and hold AFREEDEAL harmless against any claim, action, damage, loss, liability, cost, and expense (including attorney's fees) resulting from the use of the platform, non-compliance with these Terms, or violation of third-party rights.

12.title: 12. Indemnification
paragraphe: These Terms are governed by Cameroonian law.
In case of dispute, the competent courts will be those of the jurisdiction of AFREEDEAL's headquarters in Cameroon.

13.title: 13. Applicable law and jurisdiction
paragraphe: By registering on the platform, the member acknowledges having read, understood, and unconditionally accepted these Terms of Use.

1.title: 1. Preamble
paragraphe: At AFreeDeal, protecting your personal data is a priority.
This Privacy Policy aims to inform you transparently about how we collect, use, store, and protect your information when using our platform.

2.title: 2. Data Controller
paragraphe: The data controller is:
AFreeDeal, the company that publishes the platform www.afreedeal.com.
For any questions regarding privacy, exercising your rights, or this policy, you can contact us at the dedicated email address: support@afreedeal.com.

3.title: 3. Data Collected
paragraphe: AFreeDeal only collects data strictly necessary for managing the platform and connecting its users (buyers and service providers).

1.subtitle: 3.1. Data provided directly by the user
list: Last name, first name, pseudonym, provider name
Email address and phone number
Password (encrypted)
Profile picture or logo (optional)
Professional information (description, expertise, rates, etc.)
Information related to published services
Reviews and ratings left on the platform

2.subtitle: 3.2. Automatically collected data
list: Connection data: IP address, browser type, operating system
Cookies and similar technologies used to improve navigation and security
Usage statistics (pages visited, time spent, preferences)

3.subtitle: 3.3. Transaction-related data
paragraphe: AFreeDeal does not manage payments between members and does not collect any banking data. Transactions are concluded directly between members outside the platform.

4.subtitle: 3.4. Account deletion
paragraphe: Members can temporarily deactivate or permanently delete their account via the settings. This action is immediate.
In case of non-compliance with these Terms, AFreeDeal reserves the right to suspend or delete an account.

4.title: 4. Purposes of Data Processing
paragraphe: The collected data is used for the following purposes:
list: Create and manage user accounts
Enable the publication and viewing of services offered by sellers
Facilitate the connection between buyers and sellers (without AFreeDeal's intervention in exchanges)
Manage reviews and ratings left on the platform
Improve user experience and platform quality
Ensure security, fraud prevention, and compliance with the Terms
Comply with legal and regulatory obligations
paragraphe2: No personal data is sold, transferred, or shared with third parties without your explicit consent.

5.title: 5. Legal Basis for Processing
paragraphe: Personal data processing by AFreeDeal is based on the following legal grounds:
list: The execution of the contract (Terms) concluded with the user, necessary for providing the platform's services.
AFreeDeal's legitimate interest, particularly for promoting its services, fraud prevention, or ensuring site security.
paragraphe2: The user's explicit consent, for the use of non-essential cookies or promotional content.

6.title: 6. Data Retention Period
paragraphe: Your data is retained as long as your account is active.

In case of account deletion, data is kept in an intermediate archive for a period not exceeding three (3) years from the deletion date, in order to comply with legal obligations (particularly tax and accounting) and to guarantee proof of contracts. After this period, they are permanently deleted or anonymized.

7.title: 7. Data Sharing and Recipients
paragraphe: Data may only be shared with:
list: Other platform members (limited to information necessary for connecting users).
Technical service providers ensuring hosting, maintenance, security, or email delivery.
Administrative or judicial authorities, if required by law.
paragraphe2: All AFreeDeal partners and subcontractors are subject to strict confidentiality obligations and GDPR compliance.
Members acknowledge being solely responsible for the use of data they receive from other members and commit to using it only for the purpose of seeking or providing services.

8.title: 8. Communications between members
paragraphe: Exchanges between buyers and sellers may take place through external communication channels (phone, WhatsApp, email, or other means voluntarily provided by members).
AFreeDeal does not have access to these exchanges and does not collect data shared through them. Members are solely responsible for the information they communicate through these channels.

9.title: 9. Data Security
paragraphe: AFreeDeal implements all necessary technical and organizational measures to ensure the confidentiality and security of personal data:
list: Secure hosting on GDPR-compliant servers
Password and connection encryption (SSL/TLS)
Regular backups and internal access controls
Data access limited on a "need-to-know" basis
paragraphe2: In case of a personal data breach, AFreeDeal will notify the CNIL and, where applicable, the affected users, in accordance with applicable legislation.

10.title: 10. Cookies
paragraphe: Cookies are used to:
list: Ensure the proper functioning of the site
Improve navigation
Analyze traffic and measure audience
Personalize displayed content
paragraphe2: You can manage your preferences at any time through your browser settings.
Refusing non-essential cookies does not affect access to the main features of the platform.

11.title: 11. User Rights
paragraphe: In accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), every user has the following rights over their data:
list: Right of access: obtain a copy of the data held.
Right to rectification: correct inaccurate or incomplete data.
Right to erasure ("right to be forgotten").
Right to restrict processing.
Right to object: particularly to processing for marketing purposes.
Right to data portability: receive data in a structured and readable format.
paragraphe2: To exercise your rights, contact us at support@afreedeal.com.
A response will be provided within a maximum of 30 days from the receipt of your request.

12.title: 12. Transfer Outside the European Union
paragraphe: AFreeDeal is a platform accessible from multiple countries. Users' personal data may, in some cases, be processed or stored outside the European Union.

In such cases, AFreeDeal ensures that these transfers are carried out in compliance with applicable data protection rules, particularly through standard contractual clauses approved by the European Commission, or equivalent guarantees, to ensure an adequate level of protection of users' personal data, regardless of the processing location.

13.title: 13. Policy Modifications
paragraphe: AFreeDeal reserves the right to modify this Privacy Policy at any time.
Users will be informed of any substantial modification by email or notification on the platform.
The modified version will take effect 10 business days after its publication.

LandingPage.about_points_1: For clients: easy access to reliable, quality services tailored to their needs.
LandingPage.values_desc_bloc_1: Our actions and choices are based on clear principles:
LandingPage.values_points_1: Trust: establishing a safe and transparent environment.
LandingPage.values_points_2: Excellence: optimal satisfaction of our users.
LandingPage.distinction_desc_bloc_1: A unique approach that values quality, safety and positive impact on the community.
LandingPage.distinction_points_1: Enhanced security with verifications and mediation.
LandingPage.distinction_points_3: Positive impact: support for community talents.
LandingPage.description_available_mobile: We are currently working on a complete desktop version to give you an optimized experience available on all your devices.
LandingPage.title_scan: Scan the QR code to access mobile
LandingPage.description_why_us: At A.FREE.DEAL, we believe in the potential and strength of the peoples of Africa and its diaspora. Our mission is to enhance skills, strengthen trust and create fair opportunities for all. Whether you are a client or service provider, the platform supports you in realizing your projects and building a solidarity future.

Metadata.title: AFreeDeal
Metadata.description: AFreeDeal - Buy, sell, and find services, all in one place.
Metadata.openGraph_description: AFreeDeal is your all-in-one marketplace to buy, sell, and find services near you.

hero.h1: Buy virtual phone numbers for SMS OTP verification
hero.sub: NumZero lets you buy credits in XAF, reserve a temporary number, and receive OTP codes quickly with local mobile money payments.
hero.badges: MTN MoMo and Orange Money · Transparent credits · Local support

features.label: Hybrid credit model
features.b1d: Base credits never expire. Bonus credits expire after 90 days with warnings at D-7 and D-1.
features.b2d: Credit prices adapt by service and country to protect margins and keep number availability stable.
features.b3d: Top up in XAF with MTN Mobile Money and Orange Money, using round amounts suited to Cameroon.

howItWorks.label: How it works
howItWorks.heading: Credit reservation and OTP verification in 3 steps
howItWorks.s1d: Choose a package in XAF. You receive base credits and, depending on the pack, bonus credits.
howItWorks.s2d: NumZero reserves credits, calls the provider, and starts a timer based on your user tier.
howItWorks.s3d: If the SMS arrives, debit is confirmed. In timeout, cancel, or failure cases, you get a 100% refund.

pricing.label: Credit packages
pricing.title: 7 packages tuned for Cameroon
pricing.sub: XAF pricing, local psychological anchors, and progressive bonuses to maximize value.
pricing.pay: Payments are prioritized through MTN MoMo and Orange Money. Expiration terms are clearly shown before purchase.

cta.label: Ready to verify at scale
cta.title: Launch with NumZero today
cta.sub: Run OTP verification with transparent credits, anti-fraud safeguards, and local Cameroon/CEMAC support.

footer.legal: NumZero is a virtual SMS OTP number resale platform built for Cameroon first, then CEMAC, with compliance-minded anti-fraud operations.

faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.a1: No. Base credits never expire. Only bonus credits expire after 90 days and promotional credits after 30 days.
faq.a2: Local payment methods are prioritized: MTN Mobile Money and Orange Money. Additional rails may be added by market.
faq.q3: What if I do not receive an SMS?
faq.a3: Your reservation is refunded 100% on provider failure, timeout, or user cancellation.
faq.q4: How do you handle fraud risk?
faq.a4: NumZero applies fraud thresholds, temporary bans, hourly limits, and manual review for suspicious behavior.
faq.a5: Yes. Credit pricing can adapt based on provider cost, availability, and country, with a protected price floor.
faq.q6: Is NumZero aligned with local regulations?
faq.a6: NumZero applies transparent terms, KYC at higher thresholds, and operation logs to support Cameroon/CEMAC compliance expectations.

licenses.title: Licencias de terceros
licenses.description: Esta pagina lista todo el software de terceros y las licencias utilizadas en NumZero.

openSource.title: Software de codigo abierto
openSource.intro: NumZero esta construido sobre muchos proyectos excelentes de codigo abierto. Agradecemos a la comunidad de codigo abierto por sus contribuciones.

fonts.title: Fuentes
fonts.intro: Las siguientes fuentes se utilizan en esta aplicacion:

icons.title: Iconos
icons.intro: Los iconos utilizados en esta aplicacion son de:

attribution.title: Atribucion
attribution.content: Todas las marcas comerciales y registradas son propiedad de sus respectivos duenos.

privacy.title: Politica de privacidad
privacy.description: Su privacidad es importante para nosotros. Esta politica explica como recopilamos, usamos y protegemos sus datos.

intro.title: Introduccion
intro.content: NumZero ('nosotros', 'nuestro' o 'nuestra') se compromete a proteger su privacidad. Esta Politica de Privacidad explica como recopilamos, usamos, divulgamos y protegemos su informacion cuando utiliza nuestros servicios de activacion SMS.

dataCollection.title: Datos que recopilamos
dataCollection.intro: Recopilamos informacion que usted nos proporciona directamente e informacion que se recopila automaticamente:

account.title: Informacion de la cuenta
account.content: Correo electronico, numero de telefono, nombre de usuario y credenciales de autenticacion.

usage.title: Datos de uso
usage.content: Activaciones de servicio, SMS recibidos e historial de transacciones.

payment.title: Informacion de pago
payment.content: IDs de transaccion e identificadores de metodo de pago (no numeros de tarjeta completos).

device.title: Informacion del dispositivo
device.content: Direccion IP, tipo de dispositivo, tipo de navegador y sistema operativo.

dataUsage.title: Como usamos sus datos
dataUsage.intro: Utilizamos la informacion que recopilamos para:
dataUsage.service: Proporcionar y mantener nuestros servicios de activacion SMS
dataUsage.communication: Enviarle actualizaciones de servicio y mensajes de soporte
dataUsage.security: Detectar y prevenir el fraude y el abuso
dataUsage.improvement: Mejorar nuestros servicios y la experiencia del usuario

providers.title: Proveedores de servicios
providers.content: Proveedores de SMS y procesadores de pago que nos ayudan a proporcionar nuestros servicios.

legal.title: Requisitos legales
legal.content: Cuando lo exija la ley o para proteger nuestros derechos y seguridad.

business.title: Transferencias comerciales
business.content: En relacion con una fusion, adquisicion o venta de activos.

cookies.title: Cookies y seguimiento
cookies.intro: Utilizamos cookies y tecnologias similares para:

essential.title: Cookies esenciales
essential.content: Necesarias para la autenticacion y la funcionalidad principal.

analytics.title: Cookies analiticas
analytics.content: Ayudarnos a entender como utiliza nuestro servicio.

rights.title: Sus derechos
rights.intro: Segun las leyes de proteccion de datos aplicables, tiene derecho a:
rights.erasure: Solicitar la eliminacion de sus datos
rights.portability: Recibir sus datos en un formato portatil
rights.objection: Oponerse a ciertas actividades de procesamiento

security.title: Seguridad de datos
security.content: Implementamos medidas tecnicas y organizativas apropiadas para proteger sus datos personales contra acceso no autorizado, alteracion, divulgacion o destruccion.

retention.title: Retencion de datos
retention.content: Conservamos sus datos personales el tiempo necesario para proporcionar nuestros servicios y cumplir con las obligaciones legales. Los registros de transacciones se conservan durante 7 anos para fines contables y legales.

children.title: Privacidad de menores
children.content: Nuestros servicios no estan destinados a menores de 18 anos. No recopilamos conscientemente datos personales de menores.

international.title: Transferencias internacionales de datos
international.content: Sus datos pueden transferirse y procesarse en paises distintos a su pais de residencia. Nos aseguramos de que existan garantias apropiadas.

changes.title: Cambios en esta politica
changes.content: Podemos actualizar esta Politica de Privacidad de vez en cuando. Le notificaremos cualquier cambio publicando la nueva politica en esta pagina y actualizando la fecha de 'Ultima actualizacion'.

contact.title: Contactenos
contact.content: Si tiene preguntas sobre esta Politica de Privacidad, contactenos:
